creator: demis@yandex.ru
text:
(In reply to Andriy Gapon from comment #6)
I'm update system to uname -imrs
FreeBSD 11.1-STABLE amd64

And apply whithout errors patch.

svn info /usr/src
Path: /usr/src
Working Copy Root Path: /usr/src
URL: svn://svn.freebsd.org/base/stable/11
Relative URL: ^/stable/11
Repository Root: svn://svn.freebsd.org/base
Repository UUID: ccf9f872-aa2e-dd11-9fc8-001c23d0bc1f
Revision: 328212
Node Kind: directory
Schedule: normal
Last Changed Author: kp
Last Changed Rev: 328210
Last Changed Date: 2018-01-21 02:46:03 +0300 (вс, 21 янв. 2018)

Not so fast for get result.

On FreeBSD 10.3 amd64 list of previos panic in my case:
-rw-------  1 root  wheel       24761 20 May    2016 core.txt.5
-rw-------  1 root  wheel      300884  9 Feb  2017 core.txt.6
-rw-------  1 root  wheel      329938 27 Aug  03:37 core.txt.7
-rw-------  1 root  wheel      337428 15 Nov 03:23 core.txt.8

Now system uninteruble work uptime
10:56  up 7 days, 16:20, 2 users, load averages: 5,09 5,09 5,08

It is necessary to wait two three months of continuous work.
Thanks for your work.
